changes: Initial alpha release of WavLoom Express
Effects rack: reverb, delay, pitch/transpose, distortion, filter, volume, pan
A/B comparison between original and processed audio
Export to WAV, MP3, FLAC, and AIFF with configurable bit depth and bitrate
Preset library with categories and custom preset saving
Import and export presets as .wlepreset files
Kit builder with drag-and-drop slots and batch kit export
File browser with folder navigation and recent files
Session restore to pick up where you left off
Configurable audio buffer size for latency tuning
